news.title: Devina Mehra: Investors beware—Part-truths could be more misleading than complete lies
news.description: Part-truths create the sort of over-confidence that often leads people to delude themselves. Tales about compounding, blue chips or market winners that don’t offer the full picture can let investors down worse than outright falsehoods. Examples abound.
